query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `brand_settings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Pátio Estúdio',
  `logo_url` varchar(512),
  `primary_color` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#7c3aed',
  `accent_color` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#06b6d4',
  `tagline` varchar(255),
  `website` varchar(255),
  `support_email` varchar(255),
  `support_phone` varchar(50),
  `footer_text` text,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `portal_magic_links` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `contact_id` int NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `used_at` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO `brand_settings` (`id`, `company_name`, `primary_color`, `accent_color`) VALUES (1, 'Pátio Estúdio', '#7c3aed', '#06b6d4');
